title: FloristryWarehouse Oasis Foam Cross Bases 22 Inch x 2
features: Oasis Naylorbase plastic backed crosses with new Maxlife foam
Pack of two 22 inch (56cm) x 13 inch (32cm)
5cm depth of OASIS foam with quick saturation and low drainage.
Anti-slip feet prevent movement and damage.
description: Oasis cross bases. Pack of two 22 inch (56cm) x 13 inch (32cm) genuine Oasis Naylorbase plastic backed crosses with new Maxlife foam giving up to 50% longer flower life. Super strong injection moulded plastic base. 5cm depth of OASIS foam with quick saturation and low drainage. Water reservoir Anti-slip feet prevent movement and damage. Plastic lip provides support for foliage and decoration ribbon. Can also be used for artificial flowers. For 35 years Oasis Naylorbase has set the standard by which all other foams and bases are measured. Today it remains the brand of choice for designers around the world. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings. All sizes are approximate.
